devin vassell.detail: Played 33 minutes; went 1-of-multiple from three, missing the 3PM over 2 prop
devin vassell.web_narrative: Vassell missed the 3PM over 2 prop by hitting only 1 three-pointer across 33 minutes. No injury or external factor was identified; it appears to be a cold shooting performance from beyond the arc.

dylan harper.detail: Played 27 minutes in Game 7; most recent Rotowire news references Game 6 performance

isaiah hartenstein.detail: Played only 21 minutes in Game 7, finishing with 5 rebounds and missing the rebound over 6 prop
isaiah hartenstein.web_narrative: Hartenstein played just 21 minutes in the Game 7 loss, well below his recent workload, and grabbed only 5 rebounds against his over 6 line. The reduced minutes likely limited his rebounding opportunities, though no explicit injury or coach decision was cited in available sources.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 42 minutes in Game 7 win, recording 22 points and 7 rebounds to advance to NBA Finals
